chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-4658 of 2016 --------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------- For Direction 1.For order on CMA No.27018/2016. 2.For orders as to non-prosecution. 13.10.2016 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar, Advocate for Petitioner. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Learned counsel on instructions does not want to proceed further as the petitioner wants to approach Islamabad High Court for the appropriate relief. In view of this statement, this petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Asif
